assertions.description: navigator.gpu is available for WebGPU access.
navigator.gpu.requestAdapter() returns a promise resolving to a GPUAdapter or null.
A WGSL shader using the buffer_view feature can be compiled via createComputePipeline.
assertions.test: (()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;return navigator.gpu.requestAdapter({}).then(async a=>{if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();const m=d.createShaderModule({code:'enable buffer_view;\n@compute @workgroup_size(1) fn main(){}'});return m.getCompilationInfo().then(ci=>ci.messages.filter(m=>m.type==='error').length===0)}).catch(()=>false)})()

assertions.description: A buffer_view in WGSL allows reinterpreting buffer data as a different type (e.g. f32 as u32).
